description: Baseline: First Load JS = 156 KB (page=54.3 KB, shared=102 KB). Total JS raw=936.6 KB, gz=283.9 KB. CSS raw=32.8 KB, gz=6.6 KB.
Move optimizePackageImports under experimental (correct location for Next.js 15.5). No improvement — 157 KB (worse by 1 KB). Tree-shaking already works without it.
Lazy-load AboutModal via React.lazy. Splits ~5KB of text-heavy modal content into a separate chunk loaded on demand. First Load 156→155 KB, page chunk 54.3→53.1 KB, gz 13.1→11.8 KB.
Replace 4 floating emoji motion.divs with CSS-only animations. JS page chunk 53.1→53.0 KB, gz 11.8→11.7 KB. CSS +0.6KB but JS smaller. Simpler code.

Remove unused Shadcn UI components (card, progress), cn() utility, and deps (clsx, tailwind-merge, class-variance-authority, lucide-react). CSS gz 6.6→6.4 KB. JS unchanged (tree-shaking already excluded them). Simpler codebase.

Switch from motion to LazyMotion+m components with domAnimation features. Loads only animation features, not layout/drag/etc. First Load 155→144 KB (-11 KB, -7.1%). Page chunk 53→42.2 KB. Total JS gz 284→273.6 KB.
Lazy-load VictoryScreen and LevelCompleteScreen via React.lazy. Page chunk 42.2→41.8 KB. Splits rarely-shown screens into separate chunks loaded on demand. Simpler KeyboardEngine.
Reduce particle count 32→20. No bundle size impact — particle count is runtime data, not code size. Reverted.
Lazy-load ParticleExplosion via React.lazy. Page chunk 41.8→41.3 KB. Particles only loaded when first celebration triggers. App chunk gz 11.3→10.8 KB.
Compact spelling words into comma-separated strings split at runtime. Raw app chunk 40.5→38.8 KB. No gzip improvement (already compresses well). Cleaner representation.
Compact wrong-key phrases into single pipe-delimited string. Marginal raw savings (38.8→38.7 KB). Consistent format with spelling words.
Add reactStrictMode: false. No bundle size impact — strict mode only affects dev builds. Reverting.

Replace AnimatePresence message animations with CSS keyframes. Remove AnimatePresence import from KeyboardEngine. First Load 144→143 KB. Messages now use CSS animate-msg-in / animate-msg-wrong-in classes.
